overall.description: Cinematic first-person walk through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing neon-lit skyscrapers, digital billboards, wet reflective streets, and a futuristic plaza with a massive holographic display. The footage features high-end game engine rendering with vibrant neon lighting and detailed cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic downtown sidewalk with digital advertising towers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past illuminated digital billboards and neon advertisements

entered.detail: tall illuminated advertising screens displaying various neon advertisements on the left building facade
modern horizontal LED street lights mounted on tall poles along the road
wet asphalt road with yellow lane markings and light trails from moving traffic
yellow tactile paving strips running along the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow cyberpunk city street with towering glass buildings covered in digital billboards on the left. The wet pavement reflects the neon lights from advertisements and street lamps. Light trails from sparse traffic streak along the multi-lane road to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: street approaching elevated highway overpass with palm trees

events.description: approaching elevated highway overpass structure spanning the road ahead
turning right toward the plaza entrance between buildings

agents.ego_description: approaching the overpass structure and turning right into a plaza area with palm trees

entered.detail: elevated highway overpass with concrete supports spanning across the street
tall palm trees visible near the overpass structure
yellow and white striped concrete barriers along the road edge

segments.scene_description: Continuing toward an elevated highway overpass that spans the street ahead. The camera turns right, moving away from the main street and digital billboards toward a plaza entrance. Palm trees and road barriers become visible as the scene transitions from the narrow street to a more open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern plaza with glass Night City buildings and illuminated stairs

events.description: entering plaza with glass Night City buildings on both sides
ambient lighting shifts to warmer golden tones from building illumination and ground lights

agents.ego_description: walking down illuminated stairs into the plaza between modern glass buildings with Night City signage

entered.detail: modern glass buildings with illuminated Night City signage and teal accent lighting
wide stairs with warm ground lighting leading down into the plaza
wet reflective tiled pavement with geometric patterns
small trees in planters scattered throughout the plaza

segments.scene_description: Entering a spacious modern plaza flanked by glass buildings displaying Night City signage. The camera descends illuminated stairs into the open area, where the lighting shifts to warmer tones. The wet tiled pavement reflects the surrounding architecture and ground lights, creating a sophisticated urban atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza approaching massive holographic display and Militech building

events.description: massive holographic whale display becomes visible in the distance between buildings
approaching Militech building with large corporate signage

agents.ego_description: approaching the large holographic display and Militech building at the end of the plaza

entered.detail: massive blue holographic projection of a whale swimming in the air between skyscrapers
tall corporate building with prominent Militech signage and illuminated windows
elevated roadway structure running horizontally across the scene

segments.scene_description: Walking toward the end of the plaza where a massive holographic whale display floats between the skyscrapers. The Militech building rises on the left with prominent corporate signage, while an elevated highway crosses the scene. The holographic display shifts from blue to red tones as the camera approaches, creating a dramatic cyberpunk vista.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, neon-drenched city street into a vast, sophisticated corporate plaza. It begins by gliding along wet pavement reflecting towering digital billboards and the light trails of sparse traffic, before turning right toward an elevated highway overpass. As the camera moves away from the main road, the environment opens up past palm trees and road barriers, leading the viewer down illuminated stairs into a spacious plaza flanked by glass buildings. The scene then shifts toward warmer lighting and reflective tiled floors, finally advancing toward a dramatic vista where a massive holographic whale floats between the Militech building and an overhead highway, shifting from blue to red tones.
